cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out if Jaymie tells the truth. So, we have a bunch of people making statements about each other. Let me list out the statements again: 1. Shalonda lies. 2. Teressa says Shalonda tells the truth. 3. Tamika says Teressa lies. 4. Lorine says Tamika tells the truth. 5. Jaymie says Lorine lies.
